lex.bot.dialogstate.CfnAbout: The current state of the conversation with the user.

lex.bot.dialogstate.DialogAction.Description: Defines the action that the bot executes at runtime when the conversation reaches this step.

lex.bot.dialogstate.Intent.Description: Override settings to configure the intent state.

lex.bot.dialogstate.SessionAttributes.Description: Map of key/value pairs representing session-specific context information. It contains application information passed between Amazon Lex and a client application.
